zh.Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Foliot於1140年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Robert Foliot II18歲，母親Margaret de Reinbudcourt17歲。她於大約1156年與Roger FitzReinfrid在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英国諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Foliot于1140年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Robert Foliot II18岁，母亲Margaret de Reinbudcourt17岁。她于大约1156年与Roger FitzReinfrid在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Foliot was born in 1140, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Robert Foliot II, was 18 and her mother, Margaret de Reinbudcourt, was 17. She married Roger FitzReinfrid about 1156, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Foliot est née en 1140, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Foliot II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Reinbudcourt, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Roger FitzReinfrid environ 1156, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Foliot 1140 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Foliot II 18 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Reinbudcourt 17. Sie hat um 1156 in England Roger FitzReinfrid geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Foliot è nata il nel 1140 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Robert Foliot II, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Reinbudcourt, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Roger FitzReinfrid circa 1156, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Foliotが1140年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Foliot IIは18歳，母Margaret de Reinbudcourtは17歳であった。約1156年にイギリスでRoger FitzReinfridと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Foliot(이)가 1140년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Foliot II(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Reinbudcourt(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1156년 영국에서 Roger FitzReinfrid(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Foliot nasceu em 1140, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Foliot II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Reinbudcourt, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger FitzReinfrid aproximadamente 1156, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Foliot родилась в 1140 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Foliot II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Reinbudcourt, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger FitzReinfrid около 1156 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Foliot nació en 1140, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Foliot II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret de Reinbudcourt, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Roger FitzReinfrid aproximadamente 1156, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
